TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Qnragan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 179 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 123 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 56 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 59%, Amis 3%, Tayan 4%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qnragan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qnragan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Qnragan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qnragan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Qnragan hya' ga Gukut. tay mkyahu' na Qnragan hya' ga Tkijig. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qnraɣan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa ɣukut. taj mkjaħuʔ na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa tkijiɣ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Qnragan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 67 buwan, 179 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 69% kyan ku 123 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 31% kyan ku 56 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 59%, Amis 3%, Tayan 4%, Paywan 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Qnragan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Qnragan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Qnragan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Qnragan hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Qnragan hya' ga Gukut. tay mkyahu' na Qnragan hya' ga Tkijig. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qnraɣan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa ɣukut. taj mkjaħuʔ na qnraɣan ħjaʔ ɣa tkijiɣ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
